summary_one_line: Input must reach a DTD conditional section whose INCLUDE/IGNORE keyword is invalid, triggering XML_ERR_CONDSEC_INVALID_KEYWORD.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed prologue (<?xml version="1.0"?> + <!DOCTYPE a SYSTEM "dtds/1...">) that drives the parser deep into an external/internal subset conditional section (<![ ... [), where the keyword token between '<![' and '[' is neither INCLUDE nor IGNORE, so xmlParseConditionalSections takes its else arm and raises XML_ERR_CONDSEC_INVALID_KEYWORD.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry the intact magic prefix (06 00 00 00) plus a valid '<?xml version="1.0"?>' declaration and a '<!DOCTYPE a SYSTEM "dtds/1...' line, so the parser stays well-formed long enough to enter conditional-section parsing and hit the else branch at parser.c:6892-6896; the W overlay marks lines 371-373 and 6892-6896 as winner-only, and the blocker line shows W T=12 vs L T=0.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds corrupt the early bytes (e.g. '...=127772&xml', a NUL inside 'xm.', or a mangled magic 05/57/4d header) so the parser aborts on an earlier error (XML_ERR_DOCUMENT_EMPTY, XML_ERR_XMLDECL_NOT_FINISHED, XML_ERR_ENTITYREF_SEMICOL_MISSING etc., all hot in L) before ever reaching the conditional-section keyword check, leaving the true side of line 371 unvisited (L T=0).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback: each integer/string CMP on the path to the conditional-section keyword writes a Hamming/prefix-distance bucket, so inputs that get progressively closer to a valid prologue and a recognizable keyword token are retained as corpus even before fully matching. This incremental distance reward lets value_profile and value_profile_cmplog climb the multi-stage parser gate that naive/cmplog (lacking the CMP_MAP bucket signal) cannot, which is the shared value_profile delta across both decisive pairs.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked side is the true branch of the XML_ERR_CONDSEC_INVALID_KEYWORD case in xmlFatalErr, reached only through xmlParseConditionalSections.
The call site for this error is the else arm of the conditional-section keyword check in xmlParseConditionalSections, marked winner-only.
Winners take the blocker true side while losers never do (W T=12 vs L T=0).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 371  T=12 F=6  T=0 F=401  case XML_ERR_CONDSEC_INVALID_KEYWORD:

evidence_trail.claim: Winner-resolving seeds carry an intact magic prefix plus a valid xml declaration and DOCTYPE SYSTEM line.
The winner prologue includes a well-formed version declaration and DOCTYPE SYSTEM external reference.
Loser-blocking seeds corrupt the early bytes (e.g. '=127772&xml') so the parser fails earlier.
Losers instead repeatedly hit earlier error cases such as DOCUMENT_EMPTY and ENTITYREF_SEMICOL_MISSING that winners do not.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 411  T=0 F=18  T=90 F=311  case XML_ERR_DOCUMENT_EMPTY:

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile retains inputs whose CMP operand pair is closer to matching via a new CMP_MAP distance bucket.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive delta for both winning pairs is the value_profile technique.
The second decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over cmplog, also a value_profile delta.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile delta on both decisive pairs: value_profile>naive and value_profile_cmplog>cmplog), not I2SRandReplace, so the mandatory I2S dash-row lineage check does not apply; the value_profile MECHANISM CONTEXT states the CMP_MAP bucket is consumed by feedback (corpus retention), leaving no I2S mutation-op fingerprint to verify in lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness reproducing the multi-stage prologue+conditional-section keyword gate in which naive matches value_profile on resolve rate (no value_profile advantage), showing the CMP_MAP distance gradient is not what carries the winner past the gate.

weakest_evidence_point: Which specific CMP on the path to the conditional-section keyword the CMP_MAP gradient rewards is inferred from source/seed structure rather than directly observed in a per-CMP distance trace.
